title: The Maulana Azad National Urdu University Act, 1996
full_text: The Maulana Azad National Urdu University Act, 1996 मौलाना आजाद राष्‍ट्रीय उर्दू विश्‍वविद्यालयअधिनियम, 1996 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199702 Act Number: 02 Enactment Date: 1997-01-08 Act Year: 1997 Short Title: The Maulana Azad National Urdu University Act, 1996 Hindi Title: मौलाना आजाद राष्‍ट्रीय उर्दू विश्‍वविद्यालयअधिनियम, 1996 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate in University at the national level mainly to promote and develop Urdu language and to import vocational and technical education in Urdu medium through conventional teaching and distance education system and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 09-01-1998 Notification: 9th January, 1998, vide notification No. S.O 1(E), dated 1st January, 1998, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Maulana Azad National Urdu University Act, 1996 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of the University. Section 4. Objects of the University. Section 5. Powers of the University. Section 6. Jurisdiction. Section 7. University open to all classes, castes and creeds. Section 8. The Visitor. Section 9. Officers of the University. Section 10. The Chancellor. Section 11. The Vice-Chancellor. Section 12. The Pro-Vice-Chancellor. Section 13. The Deans of Schools. Section 14. The Registrar. Section 15. The Finance Officer. Section 16. The Librarian. Section 17. Other Officers. Section 18. Authorities of the University. Section 19. The Court. Section 20. The Executive Council. Section 21. The Academic Council. Section 22. The Board of studies. Section 23. The Finance Committee. Section 24. Other authorities of the University. Section 25. Power to make Statutes. Section 26. Statutes how to be made. Show Related Subordinates Section 27. Power to make Ordinance. Show Related Subordinates Section 28. Regulations. Section 29. Annual report. Section 30. Annual accounts. Section 31. Conditions of service of employees. Section 32. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 33. Right to appeal. Section 34. Provident and pension funds. Section 35. Disputes as to constitution of University authorities and bodies. Section 36. Constitution of Committees. Section 37. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 38. Proceedings of University authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 39. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 40. Mode of proof of University records. Section 41. Power to remove difficulties. Section 42. Transitional provisions. Section 43. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament.
